system.description:
There is nothing quite like the spider's deadly elegance.

LEVEL 3

Twinned Threads. Action: Link two creatures within Range 6 with an ethereal web. When a Linked creature is dealt damage, other Linked creatures are dealt half that amount as Psychic damage (ignoring armor). You can only maintain one web at time.

Ensnare. Action: Target creature within Reach 6 becomes Slowed, or Restrained on a failed DEX save (DC 10+KEY). Linked creatures have disadvantage on the save.

LEVEL 7

Hidden Webs. You may Link two creatures you can see when you roll Initiative.

Spider Climb. You gain the ability to climb featureless walls and ceilings. You may attack while climbing as long as you have at least one hand touching a surface.

LEVEL 11

Woven Webs. Twinned Threads now Links up to three creatures. When you apply a condition to a Linked creature, you may also apply it to all other Linked creatures.

LEVEL 15

Nexus of Pain. Linked creatures now share full damage with other Linked creatures, and when one dies, the others become Dazed.
